creator: jon@witchspace.com
text:
On 26 Aug 2011, at 00:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/jdiskreport,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/160194 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/160194

Looks good to me, thanks.

--Jon
